caps.proposition_text: The clinician screens Ms. Ross for sexually transmitted diseases.
The clinician screens Ms. Ross for hepatitis C.

evidence.span_text: Ms. Ross is a 23-year-old female who presents today as a new patient for full-spectrum STD testing. We will screen her today for gonorrhea, chlamydia, trichomoniasis, syphilis, HIV, and hepatitis C. Patient is high risk due to an abnormal pap smear in the past and the recent discovery of her sexual partner having multiple partners for some period of time. We will call the patient with the results of the laboratory testing.
